title: Micronutrient Deficiency Eradication - Public Health Policy Review Protocol
author: Gallina, Alessandro L
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: As part of the Zero Hidden Hunger EU project, this research protocol aims to evaluate existing public health  policies, identify gaps, and explore barriers that limit the effectiveness of current approaches. This effort will inform actionable strategies to promote equitable access to nutrient-rich diets  and address the determinants of deficiencies. Upon piloting the search protocol shared in the previous version, t his is a refined and updated version of the search strategy, optimized for ease of use after encountering difficulties applying it across several platforms.
steps_raw: As part of the Zero Hidden Hunger EU project, this research protocol aims to evaluate existing public health  policies, identify gaps, and explore barriers that limit the effectiveness of current approaches. This effort will inform actionable strategies to promote equitable access to nutrient-rich diets  and address the determinants of deficiencies. Upon piloting the search protocol shared in the previous version, t his is a refined and updated version of the search strategy, optimized for ease of use after encountering difficulties applying it across several platforms.
